case_title: ZACHARY RAPPORT VS. FARANAK AMINI ALIABADI

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ZACHARY RAPPORT RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAPPORT, ZACHARY
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,591.98 FILED BY RAPPORT, ZACHARY AS TO DEFENDANT ALIABADI, FARANAK AMINI (PRO DENTAL CARE)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-29-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ZACHARY RAPPORT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FARANAK ALIABADI IS PRESENT. BOTH PLAINITFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2017 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAPPORT, ZACHARY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF RAPPORT, ZACHARY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAPPORT, ZACHARY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALIABADI, FARANAK AMINI (PRO DENTAL CARE) THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT SUPPORT THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF OR THAT DEFENDANT'S TREATMENT OF THE PLAINTIFF FELL BELOW THE STANDARD OF CARE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: WAIVED SERVED JUL-13-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALIABADI, FARANAK AMINI (PRO DENTAL CARE)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF RAPPORT, ZACHARY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,367.18 FILED BY RAPPORT, ZACHARY AS TO DEFENDANT ALIABADI, FARANAK AMINI (PRO DENTAL CARE) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE: WAIVER SERVED JUN-29-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALIABADI, FARANAK AMINI (PRO DENTAL CARE)
